### Post by stif7 on 2013-05-04
hello guys

i install ubuntu several version first ubuntu 10.10 then 12.4 then 12.10 but always &#305; got same problem. i have the boot scereen like below then i try to enter ubuntu bu  my problem is than i can not open and operate the ubuntu. there is only a black screen on the board i wait lots of minutes but it is always there so how can i run the ubuntu

kind regards.

my computer has 4 gb ram, dual-core 2.53 ghz. 






[IMG]http://ubuntuforums.org/image/png;base64,[/IMG]

### Post by cariboo on 2013-05-04
@stif7, use the advanced editor, and go to Manage Attachments, to add a thumbnail to your posts.

Moved to General Help.

---

### Post by Impavidus on 2013-05-04
Most likely a graphics driver problem. Can you give us the make and model of your graphics hardware?

Anyway, usually setting the nomodeset boot option seems to work. Read this: [URL="http://ubuntuforums.org/showthread.php?t=1613132"]http://ubuntuforums.org/showthread.php?t=1613132
[/URL]
I don't think it has changed since 10.10, else somebody will correct me.

---
